transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverbend Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist near me is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and plan ID number?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's Marcus Toll, plan ID is BX-48291.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. And do you have the name of the provider or clinic you're asking about?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, it's Cedar Grove Physical Therapy on Elm Street.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Give me just a moment to look that up... Okay, Cedar Grove Physical Therapy is in-network with your Silverline PPO plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, that's a relief. Is there a copay I should expect?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan shows a thirty dollar copay per visit for physical therapy services.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's exactly what I needed to know.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, glad I could help. Is there anything else you need today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you so much.
